Speaker Cooperativity: Does the model consider the speaker's intentions and context when interpreting conditional statements?
Does the model demonstrate an understanding of the speaker's common ground with the listener in the context of the conditional statement?
Does the model use the shared understanding to inform its numerical rating of the presupposition's likelihood?
Shared Common Ground: Does the model use the identifying sentence to establish a shared understanding of the person mentioned in the conditional statement?
Does the model recognize and respond to the shared knowledge or assumptions in the conditional statement?
Relevance: Does the model consider the relevance of the identifying sentence to the conditional statement?
Does the model recognize and respond to the relevance between the antecedent and consequent parts of the conditional statement?
Does the model recognize and respond to the relevance between the antecedent and target statement?
Does the model use the relevance to inform its numerical rating of the presupposition's likelihood?
